# generate-fake-server works for a package generated with the middleware flag:
# the generated main.go passes nil for the middleware argument

cd hypertext

muxt generate --output-routes-func-with-middleware-param

cd ..

muxt generate-fake-server hypertext

exists cmd/explore-goland/main.go
exists cmd/explore-goland/internal/fake/receiver.go

cp server_test.go cmd/explore-goland/server_test.go

exec go test -count=1 ./cmd/explore-goland/

-- go.mod --
module example.com

go 1.24
-- hypertext/template.go --
package hypertext

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

var (
	//go:embed *.gohtml
	templateFiles embed.FS

	templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templateFiles, "*.gohtml"))
)
-- hypertext/index.gohtml --
{{define "GET /{$}"}}
<h1>Hello</h1>
{{end}}
-- server_test.go --
package main

import (
	"bufio"
	"io"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"os/exec"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"
	"syscall"
	"testing"
)

func TestFakeServer(t *testing.T) {
	binPath := filepath.Join(t.TempDir(), "server")
	build := exec.CommandContext(t.Context(), "go", "build", "-o", binPath, ".")
	build.Stderr = os.Stderr
	if err := build.Run(); err != nil {
		t.Fatal("build:", err)
	}

	cmd := exec.CommandContext(t.Context(), binPath)
	stdout, err := cmd.StdoutPipe()
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatal(err)
	}
	cmd.Stderr = os.Stderr
	if err := cmd.Start(); err != nil {
		t.Fatal("start:", err)
	}
	defer func() {
		_ = cmd.Process.Signal(syscall.SIGINT)
		_ = cmd.Wait()
	}()

	scanner := bufio.NewScanner(stdout)
	if !scanner.Scan() {
		t.Fatal("no output from server")
	}
	_, serverURL, found := strings.Cut(scanner.Text(), "Explore at: ")
	if !found {
		t.Fatalf("unexpected first line: %q", scanner.Text())
	}

	resp, err := http.Get(serverURL + "/")
	if err != nil {
		t.Fatal("GET /:", err)
	}
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(resp.Body)
	resp.Body.Close()
	if resp.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {
		t.Errorf("GET /: status %d, want %d", resp.StatusCode, http.StatusOK)
	}
	if !strings.Contains(string(body), "Hello") {
		t.Errorf("GET /: body %q does not contain Hello", body)
	}
}
